commands.review_summary:
The PR removes an unused context-truncation import from the embedded-agent context guard and changes one Codex app-server dynamic-tool callback to explicitly discard the async event-emitter promise.

PR surface: Source -1. Total -1 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current `origin/main` still has the unused import and the async promise-returning callback assigned to a void callback slot. I did not run local lint because this review was read-only, but the PR head's `check-lint` lane passed.
